# F082 Delta-Calibrated JEPA Tier 2 Validation

## Decision
`F082_DELTA_CALIBRATED_TIER2_READY_FOR_TIER3_DESIGN`

## Purpose
F081 passed a same-seed Tier 1 diagnostic. F082 reruns the same real JEPA plus train-only delta calibrator on fresh seeds to test stability before any Tier 3 design.

## Key Results
- seeds: `37,38,39,40,41,42`
- mean calibrated transition improvement: `0.207816`
- std calibrated transition improvement: `0.039553`
- min calibrated transition improvement: `0.124914`
- mean calibrated delta cosine: `0.934403`
- min calibrated delta cosine: `0.904737`
- mean calibrated recall@1: `1.000000`
- min calibrated recall@1: `1.000000`
- mean calibrated delta rank: `7.023948`
- mean calibrated magnitude ratio: `1.009602`
- mean RNA->image recall@1: `0.771605`
- mean image->RNA recall@1: `0.878601`

## Leakage Controls
F082 reruns the F081 JEPA and train-only delta calibrator on fresh synthetic seeds only. The calibrator is fit per seed/policy on train-table predicted deltas and train image-PCA deltas, then frozen before heldout scoring.
